summary: Closed the canonical architecture and operator-documentation gap for the resolver native/portable boundary, publish-authority separation, deployment identity, readiness canary, stale-worker exclusion, and registration-failure response. Five implementation and verification gaps remain open and are not represented as completed.

gap_statuses.evidence: The canonical resolved-skill evidence and publish-authority boundary are now documented, but no production binding model or routing implementation was added in this attempt.
The canonical shared-core and fail-closed parity contract is now documented, but the pure core, host adapters, and parity fixtures remain absent.

gap_statuses.requirement: Immutable deployment identity and rollout safety
gap_statuses.evidence: The lifecycle and runbook now define immutable identity, drain, and stale-worker exclusion rules, but production rollout enforcement remains unimplemented.
The parent behavior and operator response are now documented, but worker_capability_unavailable classification, budget preservation, diagnostics, metrics, and alerts remain unimplemented.

gap_statuses.requirement: Real deployment canary and comprehensive regression evidence
gap_statuses.evidence: The readiness-gating canary contract is now documented, but the Temporal boundary, Compose, restart, and rollout tests remain absent.

Six canonical documents now distinguish portable contract, trusted native binding, resolved content, publish authority, immutable deployment capability, canary readiness, stale-worker handling, and registration-failure operations.

targeted_checks.notes: The advisory checker completed and reported the six pre-existing changed-document metadata omissions (missing Document Class markers); no new document was created.
The checker cannot scan the absent specs directory and reports rg: specs: No such file or directory.

remaining_work: Implement trusted resolved-skill native binding independent of publish authority.
Extract and adopt one provider-neutral resolver core with cross-host parity fixtures.
Implement immutable/versioned rollout and stale-worker exclusion.
Add operator capability-failure classification, budget protection, diagnostics, metrics, and alerts.
Add the readiness-gating parent-to-resolver canary and required Temporal/Compose/restart regression coverage.
environment_limitations: The docs-spec naming checker assumes a specs directory that is absent in this checkout.
